ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: Habita Patavii Prid. Kal. Nov. 1683 a Carola Catharina Patina parisina academica. Imperatori Caesari Leopoldo Augusto Optimo Maximo Triumphatori Invictissimo dicata.
ItacWorkItem.Subjects: Encomiastic discourse on the Turkish menace
ItacWorkItem.Notes: Place of publication and printer appear in other catalogues where the Oratio is attached to another work by the same author: see Union Catalog of Norhern Germany and ABES French Union Catalogue.
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
